emails.subject: Q1 Config Cleanup Policy - Action Required
emails.body:
Hi Alice,

As part of our quarterly maintenance schedule, we're asking everyone to clean up their config directories.

Here's what needs to be archived:
- Log files (.log extension)
- Temporary files (.tmp extension)
- Backup files (.bak extension)

The retention policy is 30 days - anything older than that should be moved to your archive folder. Please organize them into separate subdirectories by type (logs, tmp, bak).

Since this touches your personal config area, feel free to review the files first before archiving.

Once you're done, please send me a quick summary and post an update to the #it-support channel so I can track everyone's progress.

Thanks for your help with this!

Bob
IT Administrator
